message:
fix: update TemplateMetadata fields in app.rs to match new struct

The TUI export path in app.rs constructed TemplateMetadata with the old
field name (tool_calls). Updated to use the new field names:
assistant_msgs and tool_use_count.

Console output now shows: "50 prompts, 812 responses, 524 tool uses"
HTML header shows the same breakdown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
